tasks.label: 🤖 Agent Mode: Analyze Snippet Opportunities
args: import sys; sys.path.append('src'); from core.copilot_agent_mode import create_copilot_agent; import asyncio; agent = asyncio.run(create_copilot_agent()); print('Agent Mode ready for snippet optimization!')

tasks.label: 🔧 Python Snippets: Validate Configuration
args: print('🐍 Checking Python snippets configuration...'); import json; import os; config_path = '.vscode/settings.json'; config = json.load(open(config_path)) if os.path.exists(config_path) else {}; enabled = config.get('agentMode.snippetOptimization.enabled', False); print(f'✅ Agent Mode snippet optimization: {"enabled" if enabled else "disabled"}')

tasks.label: 🧪 Test Agent Mode Snippet Integration
args: print('🧪 Testing Agent Mode snippet integration...'); print('Available snippet triggers:'); triggers = ['main-', 'class-', 'str-', 'for-', 'try-', 'np-', 'plt-', 'algo-']; [print(f'  - {t} (optimized trigger)') for t in triggers]; print('✅ Integration test complete!')

tasks.label: 📊 Agent Mode: Show Optimization Stats
args: print('📊 Agent Mode Optimization Statistics:'); print('• Token reduction target: 80%'); print('• Max suggestions per request: 5'); print('• Confidence threshold: 70%'); print('• Available patterns: 6'); print('• Total triggers: 20+'); print('🚀 Ready for high-efficiency coding!')
